name: Walk Jed through Playwright auth setup for a platform
description: Jed asks how to set up the Playwright session for a platform (YouTube / KDP / Instagram). Sam confirms the platform, points to the right doc, and reposts the one-PowerShell-line setup command.
trigger_examples: how do I set up playwright for youtube
prompt_template: Sam: identify {{platform}} (youtube | kdp | instagram). Reply to Jed with the matching doc path (/root/solomon-v4/PLAYWRIGHT_{{PLATFORM_UPPER}}_AUTH.md) + the exact one-PowerShell-line command to paste. If platform is not yet wired (e.g. instagram), say so and offer to build the auth flow.
escalation_conditions: platform is not in {youtube, kdp, instagram}
the platform's capture script does not exist yet on the VPS

smoke_test.trigger_message: I need to redo the kdp playwright setup

notes: Instagram auth not yet built — Solomon should escalate that ask to Jed for prioritization.
